description:
Company: Pixelrift Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
About Us: Pixelrift Technologies is a Pune-based product startup building SaaS tools for the e-commerce industry. Founded in 2018, we serve 200+ mid-market retail brands across India and Southeast Asia with our suite of storefront analytics and merchandising products.
Position: Junior Frontend Developer
Experience: 0 – 1 Year
Location: Pune, Maharashtra (Work from Office)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a motivated Junior Frontend Developer to join our growing product team. You will work closely with senior developers and designers to build responsive, performant web interfaces for our e-commerce analytics dashboard. This is an excellent opportunity for a fresher or early-career developer to grow within a fast-paced product environment.

Key Responsibilities:
* Develop and maintain responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.  
* Translate Figma/XD design mockups into pixel-perfect, cross-browser-compatible web pages.  
* Collaborate with backend teams to consume REST APIs and render dynamic data.  
* Participate in sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives as part of an agile team.  
* Write clean, readable, and maintainable code following team conventions.  
* Report bugs, assist in QA, and verify UI fixes across browsers and devices.  
* Continuously learn and adopt new frontend best practices and tooling.

Required Skills:
* Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript (ES6+)  
* Basic knowledge of React.js and component-based architecture  
* Familiarity with Git for source control  
* Understanding of responsive design and Flexbox/Grid layouts  
* Exposure to REST APIs and basic JSON handling  
* Familiarity with browser developer tools for debugging

Preferred Profile:
* 0 – 1 year of experience (internship experience considered)  
* Personal projects or GitHub portfolio demonstrating frontend skills  
* Good attention to detail and a keen eye for UI consistency  
* Eager to learn and receptive to feedback in a collaborative team

Why Join Us:
* Mentorship from experienced product engineers  
* Exposure to real-world SaaS product development  
* Flexible work culture with structured learning paths  
* Opportunity to contribute to a product used by thousands of end users

---

Company: NestForge Solutions
About Us: NestForge Solutions is a Hyderabad-based IT services company specializing in custom web application development for logistics and supply chain clients. With a team of 80+ engineers, we deliver end-to-end software solutions across the APAC region.
Position: Frontend Developer (React)
Experience: 1 – 3 Years
Location: Hyderabad, Telangana (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are hiring a Frontend Developer with hands-on React.js experience to join our application development team. You will be responsible for building scalable web interfaces for logistics tracking and reporting platforms. The ideal candidate is comfortable working in agile teams and has a solid grasp of component design and state management.

Key Responsibilities:
* Build reusable UI components and front-end libraries in React.js.  
* Manage application state using Context API or Redux across complex data flows.  
* Integrate frontend applications with RESTful APIs provided by the backend team.  
* Optimize components for maximum performance across a wide range of web-capable devices.  
* Write unit and integration tests to ensure component reliability.  
* Collaborate with UX designers to validate interaction models and visual consistency.  
* Maintain documentation for components, patterns, and integration guidelines.

Required Skills:
* 1 – 3 years of hands-on experience with React.js  
* Proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3  
* Experience with Redux or Context API for state management  
* Familiarity with REST API integration and async patterns (Promises, async/await)  
* Working knowledge of Git and branching strategies  
* Basic understanding of Webpack or Vite build tools  
* Knowledge of CSS preprocessors (SASS/SCSS)

Preferred Profile:
* Experience with logistics, supply chain, or ERP domain applications is a plus  
* Familiarity with testing libraries such as Jest or React Testing Library  
* Comfortable in an agile/Scrum delivery environment  
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently

Why Join Us:
* Work on enterprise-scale logistics software used across APAC  
* Collaborative engineering culture with regular knowledge-sharing sessions  
* Hybrid work model with flexibility  
* Clear career progression from developer to tech lead

---

Company: Cloudmesh Analytics
About Us: Cloudmesh Analytics is a Bengaluru-based data analytics startup offering real-time business intelligence products for the FMCG and retail sectors. Backed by Series A funding, our platform processes over 500 million events per day, helping brands make faster, data-driven decisions.
Position: Junior Backend Developer (Node.js)
Experience: 1 – 2 Years
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka (Work from Office)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Junior Backend Developer with Node.js experience to join our core platform team. You will build and maintain backend services that power our real-time analytics dashboards. The ideal candidate is passionate about backend systems, eager to work with large-scale data pipelines, and comfortable with SQL databases.

Key Responsibilities:
* Develop and maintain RESTful API endpoints using Node.js and Express.js.  
* Design and manage database schemas and queries in PostgreSQL.  
* Implement input validation, error handling, and logging in backend services.  
* Collaborate with the frontend team to finalize API contracts and data models.  
* Write unit tests and participate in peer code reviews.  
* Assist in deploying and monitoring backend services in cloud environments.  
* Document API specifications using tools like Swagger/OpenAPI.

Required Skills:
* Hands-on experience with Node.js and Express.js  
* Working knowledge of PostgreSQL or MySQL  
* Familiarity with RESTful API design principles  
* Basic understanding of JWT-based authentication  
* Exposure to Git and collaborative development workflows  
* Knowledge of environment configuration and basic security practices

Preferred Profile:
* 1 – 2 years of backend development experience  
* Experience in analytics or data-heavy backend systems is a plus  
* Comfortable reading and writing SQL queries for complex data retrieval  
* Self-motivated with strong attention to detail

Why Join Us:
* Work at the intersection of big data and real-time analytics  
* Exposure to high-volume distributed systems early in your career  
* Growth-focused culture with quarterly performance reviews  
* Competitive compensation with ESOP options for early joiners

---

Company: Swiftlane Digital Pvt. Ltd.
About Us: Swiftlane Digital is a Mumbai-based digital marketing technology company that builds programmatic advertising and audience segmentation tools for media agencies. Our platform reaches over 50 million unique users monthly across web and mobile channels.
Position: Frontend Developer (Vue.js)
Experience: 2 – 4 Years
Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are seeking an experienced Frontend Developer with Vue.js expertise to join our AdTech product team. You will be responsible for building complex, data-rich UI dashboards for campaign management and audience analytics. The role requires strong proficiency in component architecture, performance optimization, and state management in Vue.

Key Responsibilities:
* Design and develop feature-rich frontend modules using Vue.js 3 and the Composition API.  
* Build dynamic data visualization components using charting libraries such as ECharts or Chart.js.  
* Collaborate with product managers and UX designers to translate wireframes into functional interfaces.  
* Integrate frontend modules with GraphQL and REST APIs.  
* Implement lazy loading, code splitting, and caching strategies to optimize page performance.  
* Conduct code reviews and enforce frontend coding standards across the team.  
* Write and maintain automated tests for UI components.

Required Skills:
* 2 – 4 years of experience with Vue.js (Vue 2 or Vue 3\)  
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES2020+), HTML5, CSS3  
* Experience with Vuex or Pinia for state management  
* Familiarity with GraphQL and REST API consumption  
* Knowledge of Webpack/Vite and frontend build optimization techniques  
* Experience with data visualization libraries (ECharts, D3.js, Chart.js)  
* Solid understanding of cross-browser compatibility and accessibility standards

Preferred Profile:
* AdTech, media, or digital marketing platform experience preferred  
* Comfortable working in fast-paced agile environments with two-week sprints  
* Experience with Cypress or Playwright for end-to-end testing is a plus  
* Strong analytical thinking and passion for UI performance

Why Join Us:
* Build products that influence decisions for top-tier media agencies  
* Exposure to large-scale AdTech infrastructure  
* Hybrid flexibility with quarterly team offsites  
* Learning budget of ₹30,000/year for certifications and courses

---

Company: Orbita Systems
About Us: Orbita Systems is a Noida-based enterprise software company focused on building ERP and workforce management solutions for manufacturing and industrial clients. With 15+ years in the industry, Orbita serves over 300 enterprise clients across India and the Middle East.
Position: Backend Developer (Java / Spring Boot)
Experience: 2 – 4 Years
Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh (Work from Office)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Backend Developer with solid Java and Spring Boot experience to join our ERP product team. You will design and develop backend modules for payroll, attendance, and workforce planning systems. The ideal candidate understands enterprise application architecture, relational databases, and integration patterns.

Key Responsibilities:
* Design, develop, and maintain server-side modules using Java 11+ and Spring Boot.  
* Build and integrate RESTful and SOAP-based APIs for ERP module communication.  
* Develop and optimize complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and views in Oracle / MySQL.  
* Implement role-based access control and security configurations using Spring Security.  
* Collaborate with business analysts to translate functional requirements into technical designs.  
* Write unit and integration tests using JUnit and Mockito.  
* Participate in deployment pipelines and ensure release readiness of backend modules.

Required Skills:
* 2 – 4 years of backend development experience with Java and Spring Boot  
* Strong command over Core Java, OOP principles, and design patterns  
* Proficiency in SQL (Oracle or MySQL) and query optimization  
* Experience with RESTful API design and integration  
* Knowledge of Spring Security for authentication and authorization  
* Familiarity with Maven/Gradle build tools and Git  
* Basic understanding of microservices architecture

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience with ERP, HRMS, or manufacturing domain applications preferred  
* Familiarity with JUnit, Mockito for test-driven development  
* Experience with message queues (RabbitMQ or Kafka) is an added advantage  
* Strong logical reasoning and system-design thinking

Why Join Us:
* Work on mission-critical enterprise systems used by large industrial organizations  
* Stable, process-driven work environment with structured mentorship  
* Opportunities for onsite client visits in the Middle East  
* Comprehensive health benefits and annual performance bonuses

---

Company: Lumenark Technologies
About Us: Lumenark Technologies is a Bengaluru-based DevOps and cloud infrastructure company that provides managed cloud services and platform engineering solutions to startups and mid-sized companies across India. We specialize in AWS and GCP ecosystems with a growing Kubernetes practice.
Position: Junior DevOps Engineer
Experience: 1 – 2 Years
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are seeking a Junior DevOps Engineer with foundational experience in Linux, CI/CD tooling, and cloud platforms. You will assist in maintaining infrastructure pipelines, automating deployment workflows, and monitoring cloud resources. This role is ideal for engineers who are passionate about infrastructure automation and want to grow into a senior cloud engineering role.

Key Responsibilities:
* Assist in building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins or GitHub Actions.  
* Monitor cloud infrastructure (AWS / GCP) and respond to alerts and incidents.  
* Write automation scripts in Bash or Python for operational tasks.  
* Assist in containerizing applications using Docker and managing deployments in Kubernetes (K8s).  
* Maintain infrastructure-as-code scripts using Terraform for cloud resource provisioning.  
* Participate in on-call rotations and incident response procedures.  
* Document runbooks, deployment procedures, and infrastructure configurations.

Required Skills:
* 1 – 2 years of experience in a DevOps or cloud operations role  
* Working knowledge of Linux (Ubuntu/CentOS) and shell scripting  
* Hands-on exposure to AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, IAM) or GCP equivalents  
* Basic experience with Docker and container management  
* Familiarity with CI/CD concepts and tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or GitHub Actions)  
* Understanding of Git and version-controlled infrastructure  
* Basic knowledge of Terraform or any IaC tool

Preferred Profile:
* Exposure to Kubernetes fundamentals (pods, deployments, services)  
* Scripting experience in Python for automation  
* AWS Cloud Practitioner or equivalent certification is a plus  
* Comfortable working in fast-paced, on-call environments

Why Join Us:
* Exposure to diverse cloud environments across multiple client stacks  
* Certification reimbursement for AWS, GCP, and Kubernetes credentials  
* Mentorship from certified cloud architects  
* Flat hierarchy with opportunity to own infrastructure components early

---

Company: Verdant Fintech Solutions
About Us: Verdant Fintech Solutions is a Chennai-based financial technology company offering digital lending, credit scoring, and KYC automation products to NBFCs and cooperative banks. We process over ₹500 crore in loan disbursements monthly through our API-first platform.
Position: Full Stack Developer (MERN)
Experience: 2 – 4 Years
Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu (Work from Office)

Job Summary:
We are hiring a Full Stack Developer with MERN stack experience to build and enhance our digital lending platform. You will work across the frontend and backend to deliver new product features, integrate with financial APIs, and ensure compliance-grade security across all data flows. The ideal candidate thrives in product-focused environments and can independently own feature development end-to-end.

Key Responsibilities:
* Develop end-to-end features spanning React.js frontend and Node.js/Express.js backend.  
* Design and manage MongoDB collections, indexes, and aggregation pipelines.  
* Integrate third-party financial APIs including credit bureaus, KYC providers, and payment gateways.  
* Implement secure authentication flows using JWT, OAuth 2.0, and session management.  
* Write clean, testable code with appropriate unit and integration test coverage.  
* Participate in sprint planning and collaborate with product managers to groom backlog items.  
* Ensure frontend performance, accessibility, and responsive behavior across devices.

Required Skills:
* 2 – 4 years of experience with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js)  
* Strong knowledge of React.js including hooks, context, and lifecycle management  
* Hands-on experience with MongoDB schema design and aggregation framework  
* Proficiency in RESTful API development and third-party API integration  
* Solid understanding of authentication mechanisms (JWT, OAuth 2.0)  
* Experience with Git, code reviews, and collaborative development  
* Awareness of security best practices for web applications

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience in Fintech, NBFC, or banking technology preferred  
* Knowledge of compliance requirements like RBI data localization norms is a plus  
* Familiar with Redis for session or cache management  
* Comfortable owning features from design to deployment

Why Join Us:
* Work on high-impact Fintech infrastructure powering credit access for underserved markets  
* Exposure to financial regulatory environments and compliance-driven engineering  
* Competitive compensation with performance-linked variable pay  
* Health insurance and ESOPs for core team members

---

Company: Nimbus Retail Tech
About Us: Nimbus Retail Tech is a Gurugram-based B2B SaaS company providing inventory management, order orchestration, and warehouse automation software to D2C and omnichannel retail brands. Our platform integrates with 30+ marketplaces and logistics providers across India.
Position: Backend Developer (Python / Django)
Experience: 2 – 5 Years
Location: Gurugram, Haryana (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Backend Developer with Python and Django expertise to join our platform engineering team. You will build and optimize the core APIs, order processing workflows, and marketplace integration connectors that power our retail automation platform. The ideal candidate has strong backend fundamentals, experience with asynchronous task processing, and a knack for building reliable, scalable systems.

Key Responsibilities:
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Python, Django, and Django REST Framework.  
* Build and maintain RESTful APIs consumed by web, mobile, and third-party clients.  
* Develop asynchronous task workflows using Celery and Redis for background processing.  
* Design and optimize database schemas and queries in PostgreSQL.  
* Build and maintain integration connectors for marketplace APIs (Flipkart, Amazon, Myntra).  
* Ensure API reliability through comprehensive unit testing and CI integration.  
* Collaborate with the data team to design event-driven workflows for inventory and order events.

Required Skills:
* 2 – 5 years of Python backend development experience with Django  
* Proficiency in Django REST Framework for API development  
* Strong PostgreSQL skills including query optimization, indexing, and migrations  
* Experience with Celery and Redis for task queue management  
* Understanding of integration patterns and webhook-based communication  
* Working knowledge of Git, CI/CD pipelines, and containerized deployments  
* Familiarity with Docker for local development and staging environments

Preferred Profile:
* Experience in retail, e-commerce, or marketplace technology  
* Knowledge of caching strategies using Redis or Memcached  
* Exposure to event-driven architectures and message queues (Kafka, SQS)  
* Strong debugging skills with proficiency in profiling Python applications

Why Join Us:
* Build software that powers the supply chains of India's fastest-growing D2C brands  
* Exposure to high-throughput, multi-tenant SaaS architecture  
* Hybrid work model with team flexibility  
* Structured career ladder from developer to tech lead

---

Company: Arcflow Data Systems
About Us: Arcflow Data Systems is a Hyderabad-based data engineering consultancy that delivers data pipeline, ETL, and business intelligence solutions to enterprise clients in banking, insurance, and telecom sectors. Our team of 120+ data professionals supports clients across India, Singapore, and the UAE.
Position: Data Engineer
Experience: 2 – 4 Years
Location: Hyderabad, Telangana (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are seeking a skilled Data Engineer to design, build, and maintain data pipelines that enable analytics and reporting for our enterprise clients. You will work with structured and semi-structured data across on-premise and cloud environments. The ideal candidate has strong SQL skills, hands-on ETL experience, and a working knowledge of modern data warehouse platforms.

Key Responsibilities:
* Design and implement scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Apache Spark, PySpark, or SQL-based tools.  
* Develop data ingestion workflows from heterogeneous sources including RDBMS, flat files, and APIs.  
* Build and maintain data models in cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake or Amazon Redshift.  
* Collaborate with data analysts and BI teams to ensure data availability, accuracy, and consistency.  
* Monitor pipeline health, data quality, and SLA adherence through alerting and observability tools.  
* Automate and orchestrate workflows using Apache Airflow or AWS Glue.  
* Document data lineage, transformation logic, and pipeline architecture for governance compliance.

Required Skills:
* 2 – 4 years of data engineering or ETL development experience  
* Strong proficiency in SQL and query optimization  
* Hands-on experience with PySpark or Apache Spark  
* Experience with Airflow or similar orchestration frameworks  
* Familiarity with cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery)  
* Knowledge of data modeling concepts (star/snowflake schema, dimensional modeling)  
* Experience with Python scripting for data processing

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience in BFSI, telecom, or insurance data environments preferred  
* Exposure to dbt (data build tool) for transformation workflows  
* Understanding of data governance, cataloging, and quality frameworks  
* Experience with CDC (Change Data Capture) tools like Debezium or AWS DMS

Why Join Us:
* Work with diverse enterprise data ecosystems across industries  
* Exposure to modern data stack — Snowflake, Airflow, Spark, dbt  
* Learning and certification support for AWS, GCP, and Databricks  
* Collaborative team culture with regular knowledge-sharing and tech talks

---

Company: Prism Cloud Innovations
About Us: Prism Cloud Innovations is a Bengaluru-based cloud-native product company building infrastructure management and cost optimization tools for DevOps teams. Our SaaS platform helps engineering teams achieve cloud observability and FinOps efficiency across multi-cloud environments.
Position: Frontend Engineer (React \+ TypeScript)
Experience: 3 – 5 Years
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka (Remote-First)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Frontend Engineer with strong React.js and TypeScript skills to join our product team. You will be responsible for building our cloud observability dashboard, infrastructure topology views, and cost analytics modules. This role demands deep frontend expertise, strong performance optimization mindset, and experience building complex, data-intensive UIs.

Key Responsibilities:
* Architect and develop complex single-page applications using React.js and TypeScript.  
* Build real-time data visualization components using D3.js and Recharts for infrastructure metrics.  
* Design reusable component libraries and establish frontend architecture standards.  
* Implement advanced state management patterns using Zustand or Redux Toolkit.  
* Optimize application bundle size, rendering performance, and network efficiency.  
* Collaborate with backend engineers to define efficient API contracts using GraphQL.  
* Champion frontend testing practices including unit, snapshot, and end-to-end testing.  
* Participate in architectural decisions and frontend roadmap planning.

Required Skills:
* 3 – 5 years of frontend development experience with React.js and TypeScript  
* Expert-level proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS-in-JS  
* Strong experience with D3.js, Recharts, or similar visualization libraries  
* Hands-on experience with GraphQL (Apollo Client or urql)  
* Proficiency in modern build tools (Vite, Webpack, Turbopack)  
* Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library, Playwright)  
* Strong understanding of web performance optimization (Core Web Vitals, lazy loading)

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience building DevOps, observability, or cloud tooling products  
* Experience with WebSockets or SSE for real-time data streaming  
* Knowledge of micro-frontend architecture  
* Familiarity with design systems (Storybook, Radix UI)

Why Join Us:
* Build a remote-first product with a globally distributed engineering team  
* Work on challenging data-visualization problems at cloud scale  
* Competitive salary with USD-benchmarked compensation  
* Stock options and generous remote work stipend

---

Company: Heliograph Software Labs
About Us: Heliograph Software Labs is a Pune-based SaaS company building HR technology products for mid-sized enterprises. Our talent management platform serves 150+ corporate clients and automates the full employee lifecycle from onboarding to performance management.
Position: Backend Developer (Node.js \+ TypeScript)
Experience: 2 – 5 Years
Location: Pune, Maharashtra (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a skilled Node.js Backend Developer with TypeScript proficiency to join our core platform team. You will design and build the APIs and services that power our HR automation workflows — from offer letter generation to payroll sync integrations. The ideal candidate brings strong backend fundamentals, excellent API design skills, and experience with MySQL-based data models.

Key Responsibilities:
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend applications using Node.js and TypeScript.  
* Build and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services including HRMS, payroll, and email providers.  
* Develop and optimize database schemas, queries, and stored procedures using MySQL.  
* Collaborate with frontend developers, product teams, and stakeholders to deliver end-to-end solutions.  
* Ensure application performance, security, scalability, and reliability.  
* Troubleshoot production issues and implement bug fixes in a timely manner.  
* Write clean, reusable, and well-documented code following best practices.  
* Participate in code reviews, testing, and deployment processes.  
* Optimize API response times and improve backend architecture.

Required Skills:
* Strong experience in Node.js and TypeScript  
* Hands-on expertise in building and consuming RESTful APIs  
* Good knowledge of MySQL and database optimization  
* Experience with JWT-based authentication and authorization patterns  
* Understanding of REST architecture and microservices  
* Familiarity with Git, version control, and CI/CD workflows  
* Strong debugging and problem-solving skills

Preferred Profile:
* 2 – 5 years of backend development experience  
* Experience in HRTech, SaaS, or enterprise workflow products preferred  
* Good understanding of software design patterns and system architecture  
* Ability to work in agile and fast-paced environments  
* Strong communication and collaboration skills

Why Join Us:
* Opportunity to work on scalable and impactful HR technology products  
* Exposure to modern backend architecture and cloud-driven environments  
* Collaborative and growth-focused work culture  
* Excellent learning and career advancement opportunities

---

Company: Torrent Mobility Solutions
About Us: Torrent Mobility Solutions is a Bengaluru-based EV fleet management company building telematics, route optimization, and charging infrastructure software for electric vehicle operators. Backed by Series B funding, we are scaling rapidly across Tier 1 and Tier 2 Indian cities.
Position: Mobile Developer (React Native)
Experience: 2 – 4 Years
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka (Work from Office)

Job Summary:
We are seeking a Mobile Developer with React Native expertise to build and maintain our fleet management and driver-facing mobile applications. You will collaborate with backend engineers and product designers to deliver high-quality, cross-platform mobile experiences used by drivers and fleet operators on the ground.

Key Responsibilities:
* Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using React Native for iOS and Android.  
* Integrate mobile apps with REST APIs for real-time fleet tracking, trip management, and alerts.  
* Implement background services, push notifications (FCM/APNS), and geolocation features.  
* Optimize app performance including startup time, frame rate, and battery efficiency.  
* Work with the QA team to conduct device-specific testing across a range of Android and iOS targets.  
* Collaborate with UX designers to build smooth, accessible, and responsive mobile UIs.  
* Manage app releases through Google Play Console and Apple App Store Connect.

Required Skills:
* 2 – 4 years of mobile development experience with React Native  
* Proficiency in JavaScript or TypeScript for React Native development  
* Experience with navigation libraries (React Navigation, Expo Router)  
* Knowledge of native module integration (geolocation, camera, Bluetooth)  
* Familiarity with Redux or Zustand for mobile state management  
* Experience with Firebase (FCM, Crashlytics, Analytics)  
* Working knowledge of app deployment pipelines for Android and iOS

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience with mobility, logistics, or field-force mobile applications  
* Knowledge of offline-first architecture using AsyncStorage or SQLite  
* Exposure to Detox or Appium for automated mobile testing  
* Familiarity with Fastlane for CI/CD automation in mobile releases

Why Join Us:
* Work on real-world fleet applications impacting EV adoption across India  
* Exposure to IoT integrations and telematics data streams  
* Fast-track growth opportunities in a rapidly scaling EV startup  
* ESOPs, health benefits, and quarterly performance bonuses

---

Company: Axiom Digital Commerce
About Us: Axiom Digital Commerce is a Mumbai-based e-commerce platform company specializing in white-label storefronts, catalog management, and checkout infrastructure for mid-market retailers. Our headless commerce platform powers 400+ online stores across fashion, electronics, and home decor.
Position: Senior Frontend Developer (Next.js)
Experience: 4 – 7 Years
Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra (Hybrid)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer with deep Next.js expertise to join our storefront engineering team. You will lead the development of our headless frontend framework, mentor junior developers, and drive architecture decisions that affect page performance, SEO, and conversion rates for hundreds of live stores. This is a high-impact individual contributor role with a path to tech leadership.

Key Responsibilities:
* Architect and develop high-performance storefronts using Next.js with SSR, SSG, and ISR patterns.  
* Build and maintain a shared component library consumed by 400+ merchant themes.  
* Define and enforce frontend performance budgets (Core Web Vitals: LCP, CLS, FID/INP).  
* Lead technical design reviews for new feature initiatives across the frontend team.  
* Mentor junior and mid-level engineers through code reviews and pair programming.  
* Collaborate with backend teams to design headless API contracts and BFF (Backend for Frontend) layers.  
* Champion accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) and internationalization standards across all storefronts.  
* Drive adoption of observability tools for frontend error tracking and performance monitoring.

Required Skills:
* 4 – 7 years of frontend development with 2+ years in Next.js  
* Expert-level proficiency in React.js, TypeScript, and modern CSS (CSS Modules, Tailwind)  
* Deep knowledge of Next.js rendering strategies (SSR, SSG, ISR, RSC)  
* Experience building and maintaining design systems or component libraries  
* Strong understanding of web performance optimization and Core Web Vitals  
* Proficiency with CDN strategies, edge caching, and static asset optimization  
* Experience with GraphQL (Shopify Storefront API or similar) and REST integration

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience in headless commerce or e-commerce platform engineering  
* Familiarity with Contentful, Sanity, or similar headless CMS systems  
* Experience with Vercel Edge Functions or Cloudflare Workers  
* Comfortable driving architectural decisions and presenting trade-offs

Why Join Us:
* Shape the frontend architecture of a platform used by hundreds of merchants  
* Work at the intersection of performance engineering and e-commerce  
* Senior-level mentorship opportunities with a clear path to Staff Engineer  
* Competitive CTC with annual learning budget and conference sponsorships

---

Company: Brightwave Security Labs
About Us: Brightwave Security Labs is a Pune-based cybersecurity product company building application security testing, vulnerability management, and compliance automation tools for enterprise IT and DevSecOps teams. Our platform is used by 80+ enterprises across BFSI, healthcare, and defense sectors.
Position: Backend Developer (Go / Golang)
Experience: 3 – 6 Years
Location: Pune, Maharashtra (Work from Office)

Job Summary:
We are looking for a Backend Developer with Go (Golang) expertise to join our platform engineering team. You will build high-performance, concurrent backend services for our vulnerability scanning and policy enforcement modules. The role demands strong systems-level thinking, understanding of network protocols, and experience writing safe, efficient Go code.

Key Responsibilities:
* Design and develop high-performance backend services and APIs using Go (Golang).  
* Build scanning agents and orchestration services for vulnerability assessment workflows.  
* Develop integration adapters for security tools including SIEM platforms, ticketing systems, and CI/CD pipelines.  
* Implement concurrency patterns using Go goroutines, channels, and worker pools.  
* Design secure data storage and retrieval mechanisms for vulnerability findings and audit logs.  
* Optimize service performance for low-latency, high-throughput scan processing.  
* Write comprehensive unit tests and conduct performance benchmarking.  
* Participate in architecture reviews and contribute to security posture of the platform itself.

Required Skills:
* 3 – 6 years of backend engineering experience with 2+ years in Go (Golang)  
* Strong command over Go concurrency primitives (goroutines, channels, sync package)  
* Experience building RESTful and gRPC-based services in Go  
* Proficiency in PostgreSQL or CockroachDB with advanced query patterns  
* Knowledge of containerization with Docker and Kubernetes deployments  
* Familiarity with network protocols (HTTP/S, TLS, DNS, SNMP) at an engineering level  
* Understanding of secure coding practices and OWASP Top 10

Preferred Profile:
* Prior experience in cybersecurity, DevSecOps, or compliance automation tooling  
* Knowledge of CVE databases, CVSS scoring, and vulnerability taxonomy  
* Experience with distributed systems patterns (circuit breakers, rate limiting)  
* Open-source contributions in security tooling is a plus

Why Join Us:
